name: Vermont Dietitian License
description: Already licensed as a dietitian? Here's whether your license transfers to Vermont - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.

address.description:
Office of Professional Regulation
89 Main Street, 3rd Floor
Montpelier, VT 05620-3402

requiredDocuments.name: OPR Online Application
requiredDocuments.description: Application submitted electronically with the required fee.

requiredDocuments.name: CDR Registration Card
requiredDocuments.description: Proof of active registration with the Commission on Dietetic Registration.

fingerprinting.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

mainEntity.name: How much does a Vermont dietitian certification cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: The initial cost is a $100 application fee.

mainEntity.name: When does the Vermont certification need to be renewed?

acceptedAnswer.text: Vermont dietitian certifications must be renewed every two years. The renewal fee is $100.

mainEntity.name: Is a license required to practice dietetics in Vermont?

acceptedAnswer.text: Vermont uses a certification model, protecting the title 'Certified Dietitian'. While individuals can provide certain nutrition services without certification, only those meeting state standards and obtaining certification can use the CD title.

mainEntity.name: Does Vermont have reciprocity for dietitians?

acceptedAnswer.text: No interstate compact currently covers dietitian practice in Vermont. To work in Vermont, apply for licensure by endorsement through the state board.

mainEntity.name: How long does it take to transfer my dietitian license to Vermont?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most endorsement applications take 2 to 4 Weeks.

mainEntity.name: Can I start working in Vermont while my endorsement application is processing?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most applicants need to wait for full approval before starting work because the state does not clearly offer a temporary or provisional credential.
